examples: The wires do not have a large enough surface to catalyse a big explosion.
The Macintosh computer helped catalyse a total change in the way computers were used.
And they can catalyse reactions, as proteins do, too.
Last September, 50 signatory countries adopted a new conservation plan to catalyse regional initiatives.
Natural enzymes, which catalyse the reactions that make life possible, generally turn out only one enantiomer.
